page_json.description: Discover the Elegant Black Kitchen Sink Dish Drainer, a versatile organiser with adjustable shelves. This iron powder coated dish rack offers multiple sizes and configurations, perfect for efficient kitchen storage and organization. - Lazada

title: B&W | Multipurpose Sink Drying Dish Drain Storage Rack
detail_text: Stainless Steel Material Crafted from durable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer ensures longevity and resistance to rust and corrosion. Easy Installation With its user-friendly design, this kitchen sink organizer can be easily installed under any sink, providing instant organization. Versatile Use Aside from drying dishes, this kitchen sink organizer can also be used as a soap dispenser or a place to store cleaning supplies. Multi-functional Design This sleek, multi-functional dish rack not only dries dishes but also serves as a storage solution for utensils and other kitchen essentials. Eco-friendly Made from recyclable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer is an eco-friendly choice for your kitchen storage needs.
detail_html:
Stainless Steel Material

Crafted from durable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer ensures longevity and resistance to rust and corrosion.


Easy Installation

With its user-friendly design, this kitchen sink organizer can be easily installed under any sink, providing instant organization.


Versatile Use

Aside from drying dishes, this kitchen sink organizer can also be used as a soap dispenser or a place to store cleaning supplies.


Multi-functional Design

This sleek, multi-functional dish rack not only dries dishes but also serves as a storage solution for utensils and other kitchen essentials.


Eco-friendly

Made from recyclable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer is an eco-friendly choice for your kitchen storage needs.

product.desc:
Stainless Steel Material

Crafted from durable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer ensures longevity and resistance to rust and corrosion.


Easy Installation

With its user-friendly design, this kitchen sink organizer can be easily installed under any sink, providing instant organization.


Versatile Use

Aside from drying dishes, this kitchen sink organizer can also be used as a soap dispenser or a place to store cleaning supplies.


Multi-functional Design

This sleek, multi-functional dish rack not only dries dishes but also serves as a storage solution for utensils and other kitchen essentials.


Eco-friendly

Made from recyclable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer is an eco-friendly choice for your kitchen storage needs.

page_json.name: B&W | Multipurpose Sink Drying Dish Drain Storage Rack
page_json.category: Kitchenware & Tableware > Kitchenware > Kitchen Storage & Accessories
page_json.description: <html>  <head></head>  <body>   Stainless Steel Material    Crafted from durable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer ensures longevity and resistance to rust and corrosion.      Easy Installation    With its user-friendly design, this kitchen sink organizer can be easily installed under any sink, providing instant organization.      Versatile Use    Aside from drying dishes, this kitchen sink organizer can also be used as a soap dispenser or a place to store cleaning supplies.      Multi-functional Design    This sleek, multi-functional dish rack not only dries dishes but also serves as a storage solution for utensils and other kitchen essentials.      Eco-friendly    Made from recyclable stainless steel, this kitchen sink organizer is an eco-friendly choice for your kitchen storage needs.        </body> </html>

title: B&W | Multipurpose Stainless Steel Dish Rack
detail_text: Multi-functional Design This kitchen sink rack is designed to maximize space, offering multiple storage options for bowls, plates, and dishes. Water Drainage Feature The rack features a water drainage system, allowing excess water to flow away, keeping your dishes dry and ready for use. Versatile Use Beyond dish storage, this rack can also be used to store cups, mugs, and other kitchen items, enhancing its versatility. Stainless Steel Material Crafted from durable stainless steel, this rack ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it ideal for kitchen use. Space-Saving Solution Its compact design allows for efficient use of space, making it perfect for small kitchens or those needing to save counter space.
detail_html:
Multi-functional Design

This kitchen sink rack is designed to maximize space, offering multiple storage options for bowls, plates, and dishes.

Water Drainage Feature

The rack features a water drainage system, allowing excess water to flow away, keeping your dishes dry and ready for use.

Versatile Use

Beyond dish storage, this rack can also be used to store cups, mugs, and other kitchen items, enhancing its versatility.

Stainless Steel Material

Crafted from durable stainless steel, this rack ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it ideal for kitchen use.

Space-Saving Solution

Its compact design allows for efficient use of space, making it perfect for small kitchens or those needing to save counter space.

detail_blocks.text: Multi-functional Design This kitchen sink rack is designed to maximize space, offering multiple storage options for bowls, plates, and dishes. Water Drainage Feature The rack features a water drainage system, allowing excess water to flow away, keeping your dishes dry and ready for use. Versatile Use Beyond dish storage, this rack can also be used to store cups, mugs, and other kitchen items, enhancing its versatility. Stainless Steel Material Crafted from durable stainless steel, this rack ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it ideal for kitchen use. Space-Saving Solution Its compact design allows for efficient use of space, making it perfect for small kitchens or those needing to save counter space.

aiTexts: The B&W Multipurpose Stainless Steel Dish Rack offers a durable and rust-resistant solution for kitchen storage.
Made from 304 stainless steel, it ensures long-lasting performance in a wet environment.
Its multifunctional design serves as both a dish rack and utensil holder, optimizing kitchen space efficiently.
Easy to install with included hardware, it mounts above the sink to save counter space and provide convenient access.
Sloped surfaces promote efficient water drainage, keeping your kitchen dry and clean.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Multi-functional Design

This kitchen sink rack is designed to maximize space, offering multiple storage options for bowls, plates, and dishes.

Water Drainage Feature

The rack features a water drainage system, allowing excess water to flow away, keeping your dishes dry and ready for use.

Versatile Use

Beyond dish storage, this rack can also be used to store cups, mugs, and other kitchen items, enhancing its versatility.

Stainless Steel Material

Crafted from durable stainless steel, this rack ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it ideal for kitchen use.

Space-Saving Solution

Its compact design allows for efficient use of space, making it perfect for small kitchens or those needing to save counter space.
product.title: B&W | Multipurpose Stainless Steel Dish Rack

title: (SG Seller) ★ Extendable Sink Dish Drainer Basket (Stainless Steel) ★ Cutlery Utensils Fruit Vegetable Draining Drying Shelf Rack Dishrack
detail_text: Material: Stainless Steel Extendable design, up to 49.5cm For detailed dimensions, refer to Pic 3 *Kindly do the necessary measurements of your sink to ensure product is suitable for your usage before purchasing Features: - Arch-shaped grooves allow stable placement of plates - Silica gel protection at both handles prevent slipping - Durable thickened material - Flat base allows stable placement of basket on table
detail_html:
Material: Stainless Steel

Extendable design, up to 49.5cm

For detailed dimensions, refer to Pic 3

*Kindly do the necessary measurements of your sink to ensure product is suitable for your usage before purchasing

Features:

- Arch-shaped grooves allow stable placement of plates

- Silica gel protection at both handles prevent slipping

- Durable thickened material

- Flat base allows stable placement of basket on table

title: Stainless Steel Extendable Sink Basket - Adjustable Over-Sink Strainer for Veggie Washing Dish Draining Dish Drying Rack
detail_text: 🌟 Versatile Kitchen Hero: This extendable stainless steel sink basket is your ultimate sidekick for washing veggies, draining dishes, or even air-drying utensils – making kitchen tasks a total breeze! 📏 Adjustable Sizes for Every Sink: it stretches to fit, no more awkward mismatches! 🥦 Veggie Washing Wizard: Rinse lettuce, tomatoes, carrots, and more right over the sink – the mesh design lets water flow through while keeping your produce fresh and contained. Who knew cleaning greens could be this fun? 🍽️ Dish Draining Dynamo: Stack plates, glasses, or cutlery inside for quick drying – say goodbye to soggy counters and hello to organized bliss! 🔩 Sturdy & Sleek Build: Crafted from premium stainless steel with rounded edges and a base stand for stability – it's rust-resistant, durable, and looks super modern in any kitchen.
detail_html:
🌟 Versatile Kitchen Hero: This extendable stainless steel sink basket is your ultimate sidekick for washing veggies, draining dishes, or even air-drying utensils – making kitchen tasks a total breeze!

📏 Adjustable Sizes for Every Sink: it stretches to fit, no more awkward mismatches!

🥦 Veggie Washing Wizard: Rinse lettuce, tomatoes, carrots, and more right over the sink – the mesh design lets water flow through while keeping your produce fresh and contained. Who knew cleaning greens could be this fun?

🍽️ Dish Draining Dynamo: Stack plates, glasses, or cutlery inside for quick drying – say goodbye to soggy counters and hello to organized bliss!

🔩 Sturdy & Sleek Build: Crafted from premium stainless steel with rounded edges and a base stand for stability – it's rust-resistant, durable, and looks super modern in any kitchen.

Who knew cleaning greens could be this fun? 🍽️ Dish Draining Dynamo: Stack plates, glasses, or cutlery inside for quick drying – say goodbye to soggy counters and hello to organized bliss! 🔩 Sturdy & Sleek Build: Crafted from premium stainless steel with rounded edges and a base stand for stability – it's rust-resistant, durable, and looks super modern in any kitchen.

detail_text: Multi-Purpose folding sink dish drying rack can be used as a dish drainer to air-dry kitchenware, including bowls, pans, glasses, cups, plates, cutlery, glassware, saucepans, mugs, and more. Also double as a vegetable colander for fruit and veggie washing or a non-slip trivet mat for hot pots or bakeware on your countertop. With stainless steel tubes firmly fixed by silicone, making it easy to use, lay flat, clean, or roll up for storing in your cabinet when not in use, saving your valuable counter space. Get yours today!

product.desc: Multi-Purpose folding sink dish drying rack can be used as a dish drainer to air-dry kitchenware, including bowls, pans, glasses, cups, plates, cutlery, glassware, saucepans, mugs, and more. Also double as a vegetable colander for fruit and veggie washing or a non-slip trivet mat for hot pots or bakeware on your countertop. With stainless steel tubes firmly fixed by silicone, making it easy to use, lay flat, clean, or roll up for storing in your cabinet when not in use, saving your valuable counter space. Get yours today!
product.highlights:
• Multi-Purpose folding sink dish drying rack can be used as a dish drainer to air-dry kitchenware, including bowls, pans, glasses, cups, plates, cutlery, glassware, saucepans, mugs, and more.
  • Also double as a vegetable colander for fruit and veggie washing or a non-slip trivet mat for hot pots or bakeware on your countertop.
  • With stainless steel tubes firmly fixed by silicone, making it easy to use, lay flat, clean, or roll up for storing in your cabinet when not in use, saving your valuable counter space.
  • Food-Safe and Heat-Resistant dish rack over the sink is coated with food-safe grade silicone and heat-resistant up to 400°F (204°C), making it BPA-free, dishwasher safe, and perfect for use as a trivet for cooling down hot pans from the oven or stovetop or thawing frozen items from the refrigerator.
  • Not easily bent or twisted by heavy cookware, making it a fantastic addition to your kitchen accessories and apartment necessities.
  • [Optional] With a removable utensil holder, forks and spoons can be stored in the storage basket. Compared with other dish drying racks, our roll-up dish drying rack can be dried more things
  • Easy to clean by just flushing it off under water faucet, then air drying

page_json.description: Homlly Stainless Steel. Multi-Purpose folding sink dish drying rack can be used as a dish drainer to air-dry kitchenware, including bowls, pans, glasses, cups, plates, cutlery, glassware, saucepans, mugs, and more. Also double as a vegetable colander for fruit and veggie washing or a non-slip trivet mat for hot pots or bakeware on your countertop. With stainless steel tubes firmly fixed by silicone, making it easy to use, lay flat, clean, or roll up for storing in your cabinet when not in use, saving your valuable counter space. Food-Safe and Heat-Resistant dish rack over the sink is coated with food-safe grade silicone and heat-resistant up to 400F204C), making it BPA-free, dishwasher safe, and perfect for use as a trivet for cooling down hot pans from the oven or stovetop or thawing frozen items from the refrigerator. Not easily bent or twisted by heavy cookware, making it a fantastic addition to your kitchen accessories and apartment necessities. Optional With a removable utensil ho

title: Kitchen Sink Organizer Drain Rack Self-draining Shelf Sponge Holder Dishcloth Faucet Storage Soap Drainer Kitchen Accessories
detail_text: Increase storage space The sink shelf can effectively utilize the space around the sink, increase the storage space in the kitchen, and make your kitchen cleaner and more organized. Easy to clean and dry The sink shelf can place dishes, cutlery, and other items on top, making it easy to clean and dry, avoiding water droplets from falling on the ground or other items, and keeping the kitchen clean and hygienic. Prevent sliding and collapse The sink shelf adopts an anti slip design, which can be firmly fixed at the edge of the sink to prevent the shelf from sliding and collapsing, ensuring the safety of your items. Multi functional use The sink storage rack can not only be used to place dishes, tableware, and other items, but also to store kitchen items such as detergents and cleaning agents, meeting different usage needs. Time and effort saving The use of sink shelves can make it more convenient and efficient for you to complete kitchen cleaning and organizing work, saving you tedious cleaning and organizing time, and allowing you to enjoy kitchen life more easily and happily.

product.highlights:
• [ULTIMATE KITCHEN SINK ORGANISER] A unique design of this allows you to make great use of the space above the sink and ensures that your countertops is kept clean and dry all day. Kitchen dishes and utensils can now be easily organised and air – dry conveniently. Please also check the images below and make sure that the dish drying rack fits your kitchen.
  • [NEW DESIGN] Allows ample and greater space for drying utensils & placing your condiments etc according to individual preference.
  • [MATERIAL: 100% STAINLESS STEEL & ANTI - SLIP SUCTION CUP] Made of Stainless Steel with Black Baking Finishing Surface, it is rustproof and scratched proof. Four powerful anti-slip suction cups ensure the dish rack remains in position and is not wobbly. Rest assured that your kitchen top will not be scratched.
  • [STURDY & DURABLE] A Thoughtful Design – The base is reinforced with enhanced U-shaped structure and the heavy duty poles ensure that structure is secured firmly. The dish rack is capable to hold up to 50kg of load.
  • [CUSTOMISED TO YOUR INDIVIDUAL NEEDS] There are many ways to organize these parts and you can easily do it based on your preference / individual needs. It will be one of your favourite kitchen sink accessories. - Please see option of measurement: 65cm Single layer Kitchen Rack; 75cm Double layer Kitchen Rack; 85cm Double layer Kitchen Rack; 95cm Double layer Kitchen Rack
  • [EASY TO ASSEMBLE] A simple structure and a precise step-by-step instruction in English make assembling a breeze and hassle free. It is also easy to dismantle, if need be.
  • [DIMENSIONS] Please refer to listing images for detailed measurement.
  • [SG LOCAL MERCHANT & DELIVERY] Be rest assured of our prompt delivery & before / after sales.

detail_text: Description: - Keep your sponge, scrubby, soap, brush, towel and drain stopper right where you need them. - Countertops stay clear – no more mess around the kitchen sink. - Hanging design, simple installation, fast removal and easy to clean, can be moved and used repeatedly, save your space. - Open design allows water to drain, so sponges and scrubbers quickly air dry. - Unique outer rack design, it creates a space for your kitchen accessories and fits for most of sink. Description:

- Keep your sponge, scrubby, soap, brush, towel and drain stopper right where you need them.

- Countertops stay clear – no more mess around the kitchen sink.

- Hanging design, simple installation, fast removal and easy to clean, can be moved and used repeatedly, save your space.

- Open design allows water to drain, so sponges and scrubbers quickly air dry.

- Unique outer rack design, it creates a space for your kitchen accessories and fits for most of sink.

title: Kitchen Sink Drain Dish Rack with Cabinet Door Kitchen Storage Shelf / Lucky Living
detail_text: *Key Features: -【With Flip Cover】The flip cover is easily hoverable, complemented by a light luxury handle for effortless door opening. With a thickened water corrugated PP back sheet, it effectively prevents dust and moisture. -【Rust-Free and Stable】Crafted from high-quality metal with a surface coated to resist rust, this sink drain rack with a cabinet door ensures longevity and stability. Each link part is meticulously designed to prevent shaking, making the dish rack compact and sturdy. -【Complete Accessories】Integrated with essential accessories including a knife holder, cleaning basket, cutting board rack, and chopstick cage, this sink drain rack caters to various kitchen needs while providing efficient drainage. Its H-shaped design enables a maximum load capacity of 100kg, ensuring reliable support. -【Strong Capacity】Utilizing vertical space above the kitchen sink, this Kitchen Sink Shelf maximizes kitchen utensil storage without occupying additional space. It enhances kitchen organization, accommodating more utensils and maintaining orderliness. -【Keeps Countertop Clean】By directing water from cleaned tableware directly into the sink, this dish rack aids in quick drying, preventing water stains and bacterial growth. It keeps the kitchen countertop dry and tidy. *Specifications: -Color: Black/White -Layers: 2 Layer *Sizes Available: -65cm: 65cm(L) x29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H) -75cm: 75cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H) -85cm: 85cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H) -95cm: 95cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H) -105cm: 105cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H) *Included Accessories (1/2 Layer): 1 x Knife Holder 1 x Cleaning Basket 1 x Cutting Board Rack 1 x Chopstick Cage 6 x Hooks
detail_html:
*Key Features:

-【With Flip Cover】The flip cover is easily hoverable, complemented by a light luxury handle for effortless door opening. With a thickened water corrugated PP back sheet, it effectively prevents dust and moisture.

-【Rust-Free and Stable】Crafted from high-quality metal with a surface coated to resist rust, this sink drain rack with a cabinet door ensures longevity and stability. Each link part is meticulously designed to prevent shaking, making the dish rack compact and sturdy.

-【Complete Accessories】Integrated with essential accessories including a knife holder, cleaning basket, cutting board rack, and chopstick cage, this sink drain rack caters to various kitchen needs while providing efficient drainage. Its H-shaped design enables a maximum load capacity of 100kg, ensuring reliable support.

-【Strong Capacity】Utilizing vertical space above the kitchen sink, this Kitchen Sink Shelf maximizes kitchen utensil storage without occupying additional space. It enhances kitchen organization, accommodating more utensils and maintaining orderliness.

-【Keeps Countertop Clean】By directing water from cleaned tableware directly into the sink, this dish rack aids in quick drying, preventing water stains and bacterial growth. It keeps the kitchen countertop dry and tidy.

*Specifications:

-Color: Black/White

-Layers: 2 Layer

*Sizes Available:

-65cm: 65cm(L) x29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H)

-75cm: 75cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H)

-85cm: 85cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H)

-95cm: 95cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H)

-105cm: 105cm(L) x 29.5cm(W) x 79cm(H)

*Included Accessories (1/2 Layer):

1 x Knife Holder

1 x Cleaning Basket

1 x Cutting Board Rack

1 x Chopstick Cage

6 x Hooks

product.highlights:
• 材质：不锈钢
  • 颜色（规格）：灰色/黑色/白色【海绵架/海绵架（带杆）】
  • 适用：厨房水槽旁/浴室洗漱台 等 
  • 特点：
  • 1：甄选不锈钢材质彻底跟生锈说不精湛工艺打造,耐刮耐磨不生锈,长久使用更省心
  • 2：高温测试不怕火烤 轻擦即亮，耐磨测试耐磨抗刮 持久耐用 
  • 3：45°倾斜接水盘积水可直接入池架身镂空设计，带倾斜接水盘，水渍一次入池 
  • 包裹清单：1*沥水架
  • Material: stainless steel
  • Color (Specification): Grey/Black/White [Sponge holder/Sponge holder (with pole)]
  • Applicable to: kitchen sink/bathroom sink, etc
  • Features:
  • 1: The selection of stainless steel material is thorough and does not rust. The craftsmanship is not exquisite, and it is scratch resistant, wear-resistant, and does not rust, making long-term use more worry free
  • 2: High temperature testing is not afraid of fire and can be easily polished. Wear resistance testing is wear-resistant, scratch resistant, and long-lasting
  • 3: The 45 ° inclined water collection tray allows water to accumulate directly into the tank frame with a hollow design, equipped with an inclined water collection tray, allowing water stains to enter the tank at once

Transform your bathroom sink area with our versatile rack, maximizing space and offering convenient storage for toiletries and beauty products. Enjoy effortless cleaning with our stain-resistant silicone material, which repels dirt and mold, ensuring a fresh and hygienic surface with every use. product.desc:
Ergonomic Design



Its ergonomic design ensures that all your kitchen essentials are within reach, enhancing your cooking experience.






Multi-functional Design



This new kitchen faucet shelf is designed to hold sponges, dishcloths, and steel balls, making it a versatile addition to your kitchen.






Easy Installation



This shelf is easy to install, requiring no special tools or skills, making it a convenient choice for any kitchen.






Durable Material



Made from sturdy steel, this shelf is built to last, ensuring long-term use in your kitchen.






Space-Saving Feature



The compact design of this shelf allows you to make the most of your kitchen space, keeping your countertops clutter-free.

title: SUOBAI | Foldable Dish Drying Rack for Kitchen Sink Silicone
detail_text: Foldable Design The foldable design of this drain mat makes it easy to store when not in use, saving space in your kitchen. Specially Designed for Sink This drain mat is specifically designed for sink use, providing a convenient and efficient way to dry dishes and utensils. Versatile Use Not just for drying dishes, this mat can also be used as a countertop organizer, adding functionality to your kitchen space. Easy to Clean The smooth surface of the silicone material makes cleaning a breeze, ensuring your kitchen stays hygienic and tidy. Silicone Material Crafted from high-quality silicone, this kitchen drain mat is durable and heat-resistant, perfect for daily use in the kitchen.
detail_html:
Foldable Design



The foldable design of this drain mat makes it easy to store when not in use, saving space in your kitchen.






Specially Designed for Sink



This drain mat is specifically designed for sink use, providing a convenient and efficient way to dry dishes and utensils.






Versatile Use



Not just for drying dishes, this mat can also be used as a countertop organizer, adding functionality to your kitchen space.






Easy to Clean



The smooth surface of the silicone material makes cleaning a breeze, ensuring your kitchen stays hygienic and tidy.






Silicone Material



Crafted from high-quality silicone, this kitchen drain mat is durable and heat-resistant, perfect for daily use in the kitchen.

aiTexts: The ROYALSTAR Drain Board Mat is designed to efficiently drain water from dishes, cups, and bowls right at the sink.
Made of durable, heat-resistant silicone, it withstands kitchen environments while preventing water messes.
Its foldable design allows for compact storage, making it ideal for kitchens with limited space.
Easy to install, this mat can be quickly set up to enhance everyday kitchen organization.
Perfect for anyone looking to keep their sink area tidy and functional.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Foldable Design



The foldable design of this drain mat makes it easy to store when not in use, saving space in your kitchen.






Specially Designed for Sink



This drain mat is specifically designed for sink use, providing a convenient and efficient way to dry dishes and utensils.






Versatile Use



Not just for drying dishes, this mat can also be used as a countertop organizer, adding functionality to your kitchen space.






Easy to Clean



The smooth surface of the silicone material makes cleaning a breeze, ensuring your kitchen stays hygienic and tidy.






Silicone Material



Crafted from high-quality silicone, this kitchen drain mat is durable and heat-resistant, perfect for daily use in the kitchen.

title: 🇸🇬 Kitchen Sink Countertop Storage Rack Stainless Steel Sponge Cloth Drainage Holder Drain Basket,Sink drain rack,Kitchen Shelf Faucet Sink Dishwashing
detail_text: 💖WELCOME TO DORA SWEETY💖 🌈Local Store in Singapore 🌈The store is all in stock, sent from Singapore within 24 hours, and the package can be received within 1-3 days 🌈High Quality Air Fryer Paper, if you have any questions, please contact us directly Thank you! ✅Product information ⭐Material: stainless steel ⭐Color (specification): Grey/Black/White（with pole/without pole） ⭐Applicable to: kitchen sink/bathroom sink, etc ✅Features: ⭐1: The selection of stainless steel material is thorough and not exquisite in craftsmanship compared to rusting. It is scratch resistant, wear-resistant, and rust resistant, making long-term use more worry free ⭐2: High temperature testing is not afraid of fire, and it can shine easily by wiping. Wear resistance testing is wear-resistant, scratch resistant, and durable ⭐3: The 45 ° inclined water collection tray allows water to accumulate directly into the pool frame with a hollow design, and is equipped with an inclined water collection tray, allowing water stains to enter the pool at once ✅Package List: 1 * Drainage Rack
detail_html:
💖WELCOME TO DORA SWEETY💖

🌈Local Store in Singapore

🌈The store is all in stock, sent from Singapore within 24 hours, and the package can be received within 1-3 days

🌈High Quality Air Fryer Paper, if you have any questions, please contact us directly Thank you!

✅Product information

⭐Material: stainless steel

⭐Color (specification): Grey/Black/White（with pole/without pole）

⭐Applicable to: kitchen sink/bathroom sink, etc

✅Features:

⭐1: The selection of stainless steel material is thorough and not exquisite in craftsmanship compared to rusting. It is scratch resistant, wear-resistant, and rust resistant, making long-term use more worry free

⭐2: High temperature testing is not afraid of fire, and it can shine easily by wiping. Wear resistance testing is wear-resistant, scratch resistant, and durable

⭐3: The 45 ° inclined water collection tray allows water to accumulate directly into the pool frame with a hollow design, and is equipped with an inclined water collection tray, allowing water stains to enter the pool at once

✅Package List: 1 * Drainage Rack

title: [SG Stock] Suction Cup Sponge Holder Rust-Proof Removable Sink Rack Sponge Drain Holder No Punching Soap Dish Drain Rack
detail_text: 🆕 NEW ARRIVAL - Enjoy exclusive discount pricing to celebrate our new arrival! ﻿ 🇸🇬 LOCAL SELLER 🏠- Ready stocks in Singapore warehouse 🚚 -Ship orders in 12 hours 🕛1-3 day deliver ✨ Ultra-Strong Suction Power Upgraded industrial-grade suction cup holds up to 3kg securely. detail_html:
🆕 NEW ARRIVAL

- Enjoy exclusive discount pricing to celebrate our new arrival!

﻿ 🇸🇬 LOCAL SELLER

🏠- Ready stocks in Singapore warehouse

🚚 -Ship orders in 12 hours 🕛1-3 day deliver

✨ Ultra-Strong Suction Power

Upgraded industrial-grade suction cup holds up to 3kg securely. Ideal for humid kitchens, bathrooms, balconies, and wash areas.

✨ No-Drill, Damage-Free Installation

No drilling, screws, or glue. Just press to stick. Removable, reusable, and residue-free—perfect for rentals.

✨ Rustproof PET + Fast Drainage

Durable rustproof PET with a hollow bottom for quick drainage and better airflow, helping reduce mold and odors.

✨ Large Capacity, Space-Saving Design

Holds sponges, scrubbers, scrapers, drain stoppers, and other small tools while keeping your sink neat.

✨ Multi-Scene Use

Great for kitchens, bathrooms, balconies, wash basins, and other wet areas as a holder, rack, or organizer.

Material:PET+PC

Size:15.5x7x6cm

💥Suitable for: smooth ceramic tiles, smooth glass, smooth metal, painted metal, artificial marble, smooth non breathable plastic material boards, antique bricks, iron doors, stainless steel and other smooth non breathable surfaces;

💥Note: The depth of micro bumps is less than or equal to 0.5mm.

💥Not applicable to: rough grey walls, painted walls, latex paint walls, cement walls, wallpaper, wall cloth, old ceramic tiles, natural marble, cracked walls, mosaic walls, unpainted wooden boards and other breathable surfaces.

🚀 WHY SINGAPORE LOVES IT 🚀

Humidity-Proof: Survives wet sinks and steamy bathrooms.

No-Drill Convenience: Renters rejoice—no landlord issues!

Hygienic Design: Fast-drying = no bacteria buildup.

Heavy-Duty Yet Lightweight: Holds heavy tools without budging.

🔧 PRO INSTALLATION TIPS 🔧

1️⃣ Clean and dry the surface thoroughly (use a hairdryer for speed!).

2️⃣ Press firmly for 5 seconds to lock suction.

3️⃣ Avoid porous surfaces like marble or painted walls.

📦 WHAT’S INCLUDED

1x Sponge Holder

FAQ:

Suction cup cannot hold it, what is the reason for this problem? Is there a way to solve it?

There are 5 situations:

(1) Is the wall a suitable wall;

(2) Wall defects, such as cracks or pores;

(3) The wall is dirty and dirty;

(4) The suction cup is not installed properly;

(5) The suction cup surface is dirty;

Terms of settlement:

(1) Observe the wall surface. If there are cracks or if the wall surface is not suitable, replace the suction cup installation position;

(2) If the wall is dirty, clean it thoroughly;

(3) If the suction cup is dirty, clean it with water and let it dry before use;

(4) If the suction cup is not installed properly, it can be disassembled and reinstalled;

(5) If the suction cup is defective, it needs to be replaced.

title: OXO GoodGrips® Aluminium Frame Over the Sink Dish Rack
detail_text: Product Description The OXO Good Grips Over-the-Sink Dish Rack is designed with busy kitchens in mind. It’s constructed from durable aluminum that will never rust. Extend the Rack’s arms to fit over different sink sizes and drain your dishes directly into the sink to save space and stay tidy. The arms can also be retracted to use the Rack inside the sink or on a drying mat on the countertop. The unique plate holders keep dishes and bowls upright, and the divided utensil cup is removable for convenient unloading.
detail_html:
Product Description

The OXO Good Grips Over-the-Sink Dish Rack is designed with busy kitchens in mind. It’s constructed from durable aluminum that will never rust. Extend the Rack’s arms to fit over different sink sizes and drain your dishes directly into the sink to save space and stay tidy. The arms can also be retracted to use the Rack inside the sink or on a drying mat on the countertop. The unique plate holders keep dishes and bowls upright, and the divided utensil cup is removable for convenient unloading.
